zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire於0963年3月13日出生在白展丁 艾皮爾時，她的父親Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor25歲，母親Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos22歲。她於0988年與Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev在烏克蘭Херсонська結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1011年在俄羅斯Белгородская Область享年48歲，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire于0963年3月13日出生在白展丁 艾皮爾时，她的父亲Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor25岁，母亲Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos22岁。她于0988年与Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev在乌克兰Херсонська结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1011年在俄罗斯Белгородская Область享年48岁，埋葬在Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиїв。

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.description: Prince Svyatoslav makes peace with Byzantine Empire.
Prince Vladimir converts Kievan Rus' to Christianity.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire was born on 13 March 0963, in Byzantine Empire, her father, Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor, was 25 and her mother, Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos, was 22. She married Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev in 0988, in Kherson, Ukraine. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1011, in Belgorod Oblast, Russia, at the age of 48, and was buried in Kyiv, Kiev Uyezd, Kiev, Russian Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire est née le 13 mars 0963, à Empire byzantin, son père, Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev en 0988, à Kherson, Ukraine. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1011, à Belgorodskaya Oblastʹ, Russie, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Empire russe.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire am 13. März 0963 in Byzantinisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor 25 und ihre Mutter Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos 22. Sie hat 0988 in Kherson, Ukraine Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1011 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Belgorodskaya Oblastʹ, Russland und wurde in Kiew, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire è nata il il 13 marzo 0963 nel Impero bizantino, sua padre, Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev nel 0988, nel Kherson, Ucraina. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1011, nel Belgorodskaya Oblastʹ, Russia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empireが0963年3月13日に東ローマ帝国で生まれた時，父Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperorは25歳，母Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulosは22歳であった。0988年にウクライナХерсонськаでVolodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kievと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1011年にロシアБелгородская Областьで48歳で死去し，Российская империяКиевская губернияКиевский уездКиївにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire(이)가 0963년 3월 13일 비자틴 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 0988년 우크라이나 Херсонська에서 Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1011년 러시아 Белгородская Область에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 Российская империя Киевская губерния Киевский уезд Київ에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire nasceu em 13 de março de 0963, em Império Bizantino, seu pai, Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev em 0988, em Kherson, Ucrânia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1011, em Belgorodskaya Oblastʹ, Rússia, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire родилась 13 марта 0963 г. в местности Византийская империя, её отцу по имени Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev в 0988 г. в местности Херсонская, Украина. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1011 г. в местности Белгородская Область, Россия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности Киев, Киевский уезд, Киевская губерния, Российская империя.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Porphyrogenita Princess of the Byzantine Empire nació el 13 de marzo de 0963, en Imperio bizantino, su papá, Romanos II Porphyrogenitus Byzantine Emperor, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Theophano Anastasia Argyropoulos, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Volodymyr I  the Great Volodymr Svyatoslavich Prince of Novgorod Grand Prince of Kiev en 0988, en Kherson, Ucrania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1011, en Belgorodskaya Oblastʹ, Rusia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Kyiv, Kyyivsʹkyy Povit, Kiev, Russisches Kaiserreich.
